name: The Credit Pros
description_short: Full-service credit repair with credit monitoring, identity theft protection, and a money-back guarantee across all three bureaus.
description_long:
The Credit Pros is a full-service credit repair company headquartered in Hallandale Beach, Florida, that has been helping consumers improve their credit since 2009. The company takes a comprehensive approach to credit repair, combining traditional dispute methods with credit monitoring, identity theft protection, and personalized financial coaching. Their team works with all three major credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion — to identify and challenge inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable negative items on your credit reports.

What sets The Credit Pros apart from many competitors is their bundled service model. Rather than charging extra for credit monitoring or identity theft protection, these features are included in their monthly plans. Clients get access to an online portal where they can track dispute progress, view score changes, and communicate with their assigned credit advisor. The company also provides cease and desist letters to stop aggressive debt collector contact, and debt validation letters to force creditors to prove the accuracy of reported debts.

The Credit Pros offers three service tiers — Basic, Standard, and Premium — allowing consumers to choose the level of intervention that fits their budget and credit situation. All plans come with a money-back guarantee, which provides a meaningful safety net for consumers who are skeptical about whether credit repair will work for them. The company has maintained an A+ rating with the Better Business Bureau, reflecting their commitment to resolving customer complaints and operating transparently.

While The Credit Pros is priced higher than some budget alternatives, the breadth of their service offering justifies the cost for consumers who want a hands-off experience. Their personal advisor model means you are not just submitting disputes into a black box — you have a real person guiding your credit repair journey and answering questions along the way. For first-time credit repair clients who want comprehensive coverage without having to cobble together separate services, The Credit Pros is a strong contender.

pricing.guarantee_details: Full money-back guarantee if no items are removed from your credit report within the service period.

pros: Money-back guarantee provides a risk-free way to try the service
Credit monitoring and identity theft protection included in Standard and Premium plans
Works with all three major credit bureaus simultaneously
A+ BBB rating with strong complaint resolution track record
Personal credit advisor assigned to each client
Free initial consultation with no obligation to sign up
Online portal for tracking dispute progress in real time
cons: Higher monthly pricing than budget competitors like Sky Blue Credit
Setup fee of $119 adds to upfront cost
No dedicated mobile app — portal is web-based only
Basic plan does not include all three bureau disputes
best_for: First-time credit repair clients wanting full-service coverage
Consumers who want credit monitoring bundled with repair services
People concerned about identity theft alongside credit issues
Anyone who values a money-back guarantee for peace of mind
diagnosis: Ideal for first-time credit repair with full-service needs. Strong money-back guarantee and all-bureau coverage. Watch out for: higher pricing than DIY alternatives.
services: Credit report analysis and error identification
Disputes with all three credit bureaus
Cease and desist letters to debt collectors
typical_results_timeline: Most clients see initial results within 45-90 days, with significant score improvements typically occurring within 3-6 months depending on the complexity of negative items.
